keyEvents.text: Goal!  Belize 1, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 0. Nana-Yaw Amankwah-Mensah (Belize) right footed shot from more than 35 yards to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Krisean López.
Kennijah Joseph (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nigel Charles (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Belize 1, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1. Marlon Simmons (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) header from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Gidson Francis with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Belize. Makonnan Clare replaces Jahron Myvette because of an injury.
Substitution, Belize. Eldon Reneau replaces Nana-Yaw Amankwah-Mensah.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Jequan Adams replaces Kennijah Joseph.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Najima Burgin replaces Joel Jack.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Terris Joseph replaces Jahva Audain.
Substitution, Belize. Andir Chi replaces Krisean López.
Own Goal by Deshawon Nembhard, Belize.  Belize 1, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 2.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Garret Leigertwood replaces Marlon Simmons.
Substitution, Belize. Michael Palacio replaces Allan Barillas.
Makonnan Clare (Belize) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Addeen Charles replaces Gavin Browne.
Second Half ends, Belize 1, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 2.
